linkedin.text:
"What's the return on a trip?" — every CFO, eventually.

Here's the honest math most decks won't show you. 📊

Companies running structured incentive travel report up to 18% higher sales-team performance — and far lower top-performer churn. Replacing one senior rep can cost 1.5x their salary.

So a well-produced reward trip isn't a perk line-item. It's a retention and revenue engine that pays back across the whole year.

The catch: it only works if it's produced so flawlessly that your people remember the experience, not the invoice. That's our entire job.

Want the ROI model run against your headcount? Comment "ROI" or book a free 30-min call.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership

facebook.text:
Every finance team eventually asks the same question: "What's the actual return on a trip?" 📊

Fair question. Here's the honest answer.

Companies that run structured incentive travel report up to 18% higher sales-team performance and far lower churn among their best people. And losing one senior rep can cost around 1.5x their salary to replace.

Looked at that way, a well-produced reward trip stops being an expense and starts being one of the smartest retention investments on the books.

The only condition: it has to be produced so seamlessly that your team remembers the experience, never the logistics. That's exactly what we do.

Curious what the math looks like for your headcount? Tell us in the comments, or send us a message.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeRetention #MICE #SalesIncentives
